title: Retail Operations Executive (2 years Contract)
description:
The Opportunity

Adecco is partnering with a renowned technology company


Store Upkeep and Visual Merchandising

  • Responsible for planning and OTIF execution of all assigned activations, upholding the HQ/RHQ brand and execution guideline standards include planogram planning.
  • Provide strategic input on new ideas and trends to innovate POSM plans, enhancing commercial effectiveness
  • Manage POP materials, including localization, production, execution and timely nationwide rollout
  • Monitor display and fixture conditions; coordinate maintenance through appointed agencies to resolve retail defects
  • Plan and coordinate with external agency to ensure timely and strong deployments, driving retail excellence and design thinking to enhance our competitiveness across the channels
  • Coordinate with partners on RDU purchase for deployment
  • Support in-mall advertising execution to drive brand engagement and increase launch awareness

Enforce retail execution standards:

  • Excellent time management to ensure well executed deployments, accordingly to the timeline given
  • Briefing to vendors on display requirements
  • Manage shop requests and liaise with BA/ vendors on display rectification
  • Adequate catalogues replenishment and general upkeep

Assets Management

  • Track and manage all RDUs, fixture and endcap deployments
  • Ensure displays comply with HQ visual merchandising standards and guidelines

Events and Activations

  • Plan and execute all assigned activations in line with brand standards, including planogram planning and on-ground delivery
  • Monitor onsite setup and execution for events, roadshows and activations
  • Provide innovation-driven ideas to elevate POSM strategy and activation impact

Digital Assets Management

  • Manage digital assets execution for all Samsung-owned digital screens, adhering to HQ guidelines
  • Coordinate with external agencies to ensure on-time, high quality deployments, driving retail excellence and competitive advantage through design thinking


Requirements
Degree holder with at least 1-2 years of relevant (direct) working experience in store planning & retail operations

Next Step

  • Send your resume to: pearlyn.tan@adecco.com
  • We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Pearlyn Tan
EA Licence Number: 91C2918
Personnel Registration Number: R1328349

postedCompany.description:
The Adecco Group is the world's leading provider of HR solutions. With over 35,000 FTE employees and over 5,200 branches, in over 60 countries and territories around the world, we offer a wide variety of services, connecting more than 650,000 associates with over 100,000 clients every day.

The services we offer fall into the broad categories of temporary staffing, permanent placement, career transition and talent development, as well as outsourcing and consulting. The Adecco Group is based in Zurich-Glattbrugg, Switzerland and we are a Fortune Global 500 company listed on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
postedCompany.name: ADECCO PERSONNEL PTE LTD
